title: Happy Ghast Redesign
description: ✨ Transforms the new happy ghast into a cheerful, cute creature with a friendly new face!
body:
![A centered shot looking at the horizon with the Happy Ghast - Better Redesign equipped showcasing the new 1.21.6 ghast face.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7821db609ee1b4d1e5f6bc045b8045f43086f9f0_0.webp)

This resource pack transforms the new default happy ghast into a more happy, non-threatening creature with a redesigned expression and softer visual style.

Perfect for players who love:
- Wholesome or cute Minecraft aesthetics
- Soft, cartoony styles
- Customizing mobs while preserving the vanilla feel

💡 Features:

- Redesigned happy ghast face
- Great for themed worlds or YouTube series
- Available up to Minecraft 1.21.11

🎨 Resolution: 16x (vanilla-style)
👤 Created by Avrok
